title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Decathlon India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Decathlon India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Decathlon India in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Decathlon India:
Decathlon India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
